User.title: User
User.description: Represents a student, teacher, or admin (librarian).

uid.description: The unique ID from Firebase Auth.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

isBlocked.description: Whether the user is blocked from borrowing.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Book.title: Book
Book.description: Represents a book in the library.

shelfLocation.description: The shelf location of the book.

description.description: A brief description of the book.

coverImage.description: URL to the book cover image.

Request.title: Request
Request.description: Represents a book request from a student or teacher.

userUid.description: The UID of the user making the request.

userName.description: The name of the user making the request.

bookTitle.description: The title of the requested book.

bookId.description: The ID of the book if it exists in the system.

customDescription.description: A custom description for books not in the system.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a book issue and return transaction.

userUid.description: The UID of the user borrowing the book.

userName.description: The name of the user borrowing the book.

bookId.description: The ID of the book being issued.

bookTitle.description: The title of the book being issued.

dueDate.description: When the book is due for return.

returnDate.description: When the book was actually returned.

fineAmount.description: The fine calculated for late return.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a real-time notification for a user.

userUid.description: The UID of the user receiving the notification (or 'admin' for all admins).

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read.

finePerDay.description: The fine amount per day for late returns.

maxBooksPerUser.description: Maximum number of books a user can borrow.
